titleStmt.title: SII 38.156: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 156. (A.R. No. 156 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the nineteenth pillar of the verandah, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Begins with the usual mēykīrtti of the ruler, Tirumaṉṉi-vaḷara. It records the sale of two thousand kuḻi of land, for eight madhurāntakan-māḍai, by the sabhaiyār of Maṇali alias Siṁhavishṇu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadānam of the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻal-nāḍu in Puḻal-kōṭṭam (sub-division) of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam to Vēḷāṉ Arumoḻiyāṉ Mūvēndappallavaraiyan of Paruttikkuḍi in Nenmali-nāḍu in Arumoḻidēva-vaḷanāḍu (a sub-division) of Chōḻa-maṇḍalam. The latter in turn gifted the same to the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr for replenishing the sacred ash (tirunīṟu-for the use in the temple). It is also recorded that one paṭṭi of land consisted of one thousand kuḻi measured by the rod of sixteen sāṇ. The temple official (śrīkāriyam) undertook the responsibility of overseeing the arrangement.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iru nilamaṭaṉtaiyum poṟcayappāvaiyuñ cirttaniccelviyu
n=taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutiyalūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟaināṭum tuṭarvaṉavelip paṭarvaṉa
vāciyuñ cuḷḷiccūḻ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟa karumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkaṭakka(ṭakka)mu
m porukaṭaliḻattaraicar tamuṭiyu māṅkavaṉṟeviyaroṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkal
teṉṉavaṉ vaitta cuntaramuṭiyu mintaraṉāramum teṇṭiṟai yiḻa maṇṭala muḻuvatum
Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyiṟ cuṭuṅkulatanamāka palar pukaḻmuṭiyuñ ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatirvelait to
l peruṅkāval palpaḻan=tivum ceruviṟ ciṉalirupattoru kālaraicu kaṭṭa
paracurāmaṉ mevaruñ cān=timat tivaraṇkaruti Iruttic cempoṟṟirut taku muṭiyum payaṅkoṭu
paḻi mika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta cayaciṅkanaḷapperum pukaḻoṭum piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamu
m navanitik kulapperumalaikaḷum vikkiramavīrar cakkarakoṭṭamum mutirpaṭavillai matura
maṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭaivaḷanāmaṇaik koṇamum veñciṉavirar pañcappaḷḷiyum mācaṭaippaḻaṉa mācuṇi tecamum
ayarvil vaṇpūrtti yāti nakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉ ṟol kulattintararataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷattuk kiḷaiyoṭum
piṭittu palatanattoṭu niṟaikulatanak kuvaiyuṅ kiṭṭaruñ ceṟimiḷai Oṭṭaviṣayamum pūcurar cera nalkkocala
nāṭu n=tanmapālaṉai vemmuṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭuṟai colait taṇṭa puttiyu miraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkitRead muraṇurattākkitikkaṉai
kirtti takkaṇalāṭamuṅ kovintacan=taṉ māviḻintoṭa taṅkāta cāral vaṅkāḷatecamu toṭukaṭaṟ caṅkavoṭṭal mahipālaṉai
veñcamar viḷākattañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyum peṇṭir paṇṭāramum nittilar neṭuṅkaṭaluttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tirtta teṟipuna
l kaṅkaiyum Alaikaṭalnaṭuviṟ palakalañ celuttic caṅkirāma vijaiyottuṅkavarmmanākiya kaṭārattaraicaṉai vākai
yam porukaṭal kumpakkariyoṭu makappaṭutturimaiyil piṟakkiya perunetippiṟakkamum mārttavan(a) nakar port
toḻil vācalil viccātira toraṇamum moytoḷi puṉamaṇip putavamuṅ kanamaṇik katavum niṟai ji vijaiyamu tuṟainīrp
paṉṇaiyumvaṉ malaiyūraiyiṟ te(o)ṉmalaiyurumāḻ kaṭalakaḻcūḻ māyiriṭiṅkamuṅ kalaṅkāvalviṉai Ilaṅkācopamuṅ
kāppuṟu niṟai puṉal māppappāḷamuṅ kāvalam puricai mevili paṅkamum viḷaippuntūruṭai vaḷaippa[ ntū] ru talait
takkor pukaḻ kalaittakkolamuṅ titamar valviṉai mātamaliṅkamuṅ kalāmutirk kaṭun=tiṟalilāmuri tecamu tena
kka vārpoḻil mānakkavāramum toṭukaṭaṟkāval kaṭumuraṭ kaṭāramum māpporu taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa kopparakesa
rivammarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājendracoḷadevarkku yāṇṭu 3 tāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭ
ṭattu puḻaṟnāṭṭu tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār tevatānam puḻalnāṭṭu maṇaliyāṉa siṁhaviṣṇaccaruppetimaṅkalattu
sabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇakkaiyyeḻuttu coḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmali
nāṭṭu paruttikkuṭiyān veḷāṉarumoḻiyāṉ muven=tappallavaraiyan tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyā
r koyilil nattappūmi Aḻiyun=tiruniṟṟukku vaitta nivan=tattukku nāṅkaḷ vilai koṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭutta nilamāvatu
Eṅkaḷurk kiḻ kaḻaṉi muccillaikku meṟkum kīḻpāṟkellai sabhai mañcikattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkel
lai kaḻikaḷil Umirkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai sabhai mañcikattukku kiḻakkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ
ḷu makappaṭṭa nilattukku patiṉaṟucāṇkolālāyiraṅkuḻi koṇṭatu paṭṭi Oṉṟāka Iraṇṭāyiraṅkuḻi meṟpaṭiyāṉu
kku viṟṟu Iṉṉilattukku vilaiyāka nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa maturān=taka tevanmāṭai Eṭṭukkum Iṉnila
m candrādittavaṟ niṟpataṟku viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañceytu kuṭuttom maṇalisabhaiyom Uṭaiyār śrī kāriyañ ce
yvārkaḷe kaṇṭukoḷvārkaḷāka Itu panmāheśvararakṣai §
Digital edition of SII 38.156 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
